---
title: "Client Report - Famous Names"
subtitle: "Unit 1 Stretch Task: Elliot"
author: "Mitzi Vite"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    page-layout: full
    # title-block-banner: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: body
    number-sections: false
    html-math-method: katex
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show the code"
    code-overflow: wrap
    code-copy: hover
    code-tools:
        source: false
        toggle: true
        caption: See code
execute: 
  warning: false
    
---

```{python}
import polars as pl
from lets_plot import *

LetsPlot.setup_html(offline=True)

df = pl.read_csv("names_year_csv.csv")
# df.head()
```

```{python}
elliot = (
    df.filter(
      (pl.col("name") == "Elliot") 
    )

    .select(["name","year", "Total"])
    .sort("year")
)

plot_data = elliot.to_dict(as_series=False)
labels = {
    "year": [1975, 1993, 2010],
    "Total": [2900, 2900, 2900],
    "txt": ["E.T Released", "Second Released", "Third Released "]
}

(
    ggplot(plot_data, aes(x="year", y="Total", color="name"))
    + geom_line(size=1.2)
    + scale_color_manual(values={"Elliot":"blue"})
    + geom_vline(xintercept=1982, linetype="dashed", color="red", size=1.1)
    + geom_vline(xintercept=1984, linetype="dashed", color="red", size=1.1)
    + geom_vline(xintercept=2002, linetype="dashed", color="red", size=1.1)
    + scale_x_continuous(
        limits=[1950, 2024],
        breaks=list(range(1950, 2025, 10)),
        expand=[0, 0],
        format='.0f'
    )
    + scale_y_continuous(format=".0f")
    + labs(
      title = 'Elliot...What?',
      x = 'year',
      y= '',
      color="name"
    )
    + geom_text(
        data=labels,
        mapping=aes(x="year", y="Total", label="txt"),
        color="black",
        size=7
    )
    + theme(
        panel_background=element_rect(fill="#eeeeee", color=None),
        plot_background=element_rect(fill="white", color=None),
        panel_border=element_rect(color="white", size=0),
        axis_line=element_blank(),
        panel_grid_major=element_line(color="white"),
        legend_position=(1.1, 0.9),
        plot_margin=[10, 130, 10, 10],
        plot_title=element_text(family="Georgia", size=24, color="black"),
        axis_title=element_text(family="Georgia", size=16),
        axis_text=element_text(family="Georgia", size=16),
        legend_text=element_text(family="Georgia", size=16),
        legend_title=element_text(family="Georgia", size=16),
    )
    + ggsize(830, 500)
)
```
